name: minimum-limits
description: Implementations MUST enforce minimum limits and MUST NOT allow limits to be disabled per spec Section 7.2.3

max_artifact_size.description: Maximum individual artifact size cannot be set below 1 MB

max_pack_size.description: Maximum pack size cannot be set below 10 MB

max_artifact_count.description: Maximum artifact count cannot be set below 100

tests.description: Setting limit to 0 (disabled) must be rejected
100 bytes is below the 1 MB minimum
1 MB is below the 10 MB minimum for pack size
10 is below the 100 minimum artifact count

notes: Per spec Section 7.2.3: Implementations MUST enforce minimums and MUST NOT allow limits to be disabled entirely. This prevents configuration-based DoS.
